messages.text: A Bigger Table. A Brighter Future.
I’m a bridge builder, a fighter for us, and a visionary for the future of Arkansas.
Our campaign is about expanding opportunity, strengthening our communities, and proving that when Arkansans come together, we can fly.

bioFacts.fact: Grew up in Pine Bluff as the son of a minister.
Path led to science while staying rooted in Arkansas.
Bridge-building narrative: faith and science, rural and urban, young and old; respecting tradition while bringing new ideas.

issuePillars.title: Jobs & Local Economy
issuePillars.summary: We can build an economy that lifts every community. Good jobs, fair wages, small business growth, high-quality internet access, and hospitals that stay open in rural towns.

issuePillars.title: Families & Health
issuePillars.summary: Every family deserves the chance to thrive. Stronger schools, a full range of comprehensive maternal health support, addiction support and recovery, and food security must be part of the foundation for healthy communities.

issuePillars.title: Schools & Innovation
issuePillars.summary: Our government should invest in our people. Early childhood education, hands-on apprenticeships, and training in both technology and the trades will prepare our children and our workforce for tomorrow.

issuePillars.title: Democracy for the People
issuePillars.summary: Democracy belongs to all of us. Fair maps, secure and accessible elections, a government you can trust, and leaders who listen are the guardrails that protect our voice and our future.
